tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results are largely within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, which increase cardiovascular risk, especially at this age. Chloride is slightly above normal but likely not clinically significant in isolation. Glucose control and renal function are normal. Recommend lipid management and cardiovascular risk assessment.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
